prose: **Formaldehyde Fukui reactivity descriptors** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz`, no geometry relaxation (single-point Fukui). SCF converged for the neutral, cation, and anion states; no warnings reported by the engine. Maximum electrophilic Fukui index (f⁺) = 0.7083913 at carbon (atom 2); maximum nucleophilic Fukui index (f⁻) = 0.46742464 at oxygen (atom 1). Arrays: f⁺ = [0.46813824, 0.7083913, −0.088269392, −0.088260145]; f⁻ = [0.46742464, 0.11244422, 0.21007563, 0.21005551]; dual descriptor = [0.00071359555, 0.59594709, −0.29834503, −0.29831566]. Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out formaldehyde_fukui_dft_standard.json`. JSON result: `formaldehyde_fukui_dft_standard.json`.
